candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue row; preferred as primary reported revenue line.
Also top-line sales and numerically identical to Total Revenue in preview; useful fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Both rows represent the revenue line; use as priority list, not sum.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct cost line on income statement; best match for COGS.
Inventory asset component, not an income statement expense; not appropriate for COGS mapping.

candidates.row_label: Finished products and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory asset component, not an income statement expense; not appropriate for COGS mapping.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row and should be avoided when explicit expense row exists.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Selected explicit cost of sales row; excluded balancing and balance-sheet inventory rows.

candidates.why: Overhead personnel-related operating expense; valid SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket; valid SG&A component.
Generic overhead bucket, but preview appears empty; still a semantically relevant SG&A row if reported in some years.
Balance sheet liability/accrual row, not an income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row exists. Selected operating overhead components and excluded COGS, depreciation/amortization, impairments, and totals/subtotals.
No research and development expense line identified on the provided statements.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; usable fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable.
Explicit interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Specific lease-interest component; narrower than total interest expense, useful lower-priority fallback.
Small interest-related component, not preferred over main interest line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; not preferred over reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list: explicit interest expense first, broader financial expenses second if label changes or is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Impairment and capital gains for investments recognised according to the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement affiliate-related line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Reversal of a previous impairment for investments recognised according to the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit/loss from investments recognised according to the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of tax from investments recognised according to the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement tax line, not equity.
Not the shareholders' equity denominator; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Investments recognised according to the equity method
candidates.why: Asset line for equity-accounted investments, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line excluding non-controlling interests; best match for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Selected parent equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Income statement OCI attribution line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Explicit balance sheet non-controlling interests line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback if reporting label changes by year.

candidates.row_label: Equity including non-controlling interests Non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Total equity including NCI; should not be used for MIB because it would double count with BE.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet NCI labels only; excluded total equity including NCI to avoid double counting.
